default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Okta and GrowthX to discuss progress on account targeting, artifact creation, and AI tool implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on Auth0 artifacts now; Okta artifacts to be completed in November](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Healthcare and hospitality artifacts in progress; FinServe to follow](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [New GEM instructions created to improve SDR/AE effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Exploring ways to integrate broader positioning context into AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Topics

### Project Priorities and Timeline

  - [Current priority is Auth0; existing Okta artifacts will be used for now](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Full Okta artifact development planned for November](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Sydney working on healthcare and hospitality artifacts; will move to FinServe next](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [44 retail target accounts have been completed](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

### Okta Competitive Positioning

  - [Okta excels in highly regulated industries due to compliance advantages](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Traditional industries often view IAM through an IT-oriented lens](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Okta's workforce identity solutions provide an entry point for expansion](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

### AI Tool Implementation (GEM)

  - [Kyle developed new GEM instructions to improve output consistency and usability](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Instructions include context setting, output structures, and style guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Aim to "dummy-proof" the process and make it easy for SDRs/AEs to use](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Output includes account synopsis, key signals, recommended approach, and email structures](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Considering ways to incorporate broader positioning context into the tool](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

### Cross-functional Tool Usage

  - [Discussing potential for marketers (especially ABM team) to use the same AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)

  - [Potential to use AI for identifying common challenges across multiple accounts for ABM campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)

### Artifact Sharing and Management

  - [Rachel to create an Okta folder for easier sharing of artifacts within the company](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Investigating ways to automatically update Notebook LM with new document versions](https://fathom.video/share/JTAMy2xmhcoBxGpYVKLNzWUv1KVW5Fbx?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
